title: Geography of Bihar in 60 seconds
description:
Bihar’s geography plays a major role in shaping eastern India. In this video, we explain Bihar in a simple way from the fertile Gangetic plains divided by the Ganga into North and South Bihar, to the sub-Himalayan Shivalik foothills and the southern plateau region.

We cover how rivers like Ganga, Gandak, Koshi, Son and Mahananda influence floods, farming, and wetlands. While annual floods can damage crops, they also create unique ecosystems where Bihar’s famous makhana grows turning wetlands into a valuable resource.

Watch till the end and comment which state you want next.

#Bihar #GeographyOfBihar #IndianGeography #GangeticPlain #GangaRiver #KoshiRiver #IndiaExplained #EducationalVideo #IndianStates #TheInformedCitizen
